description: Conservative inventory of distinct strategy configurations that were backtested during the research phase of ai_signal_cc2_harness. Used by run_selection_bias.py --auto to pass a realistic N_trials into the Deflated Sharpe Ratio / Haircut calculation. Update this file whenever you run a new comparison / grid / experiment.
references: Bailey & Lopez de Prado (2014) The Deflated Sharpe Ratio. N should count every distinct strategy configuration whose backtest was inspected, not just the single final choice.

scripts.phase: coarse
fine
scripts.param_space: ra(5) * tp(5) * mst(3) * sd(3) centered on Phase 1 best (minus ~5 overlaps with coarse)

scripts.phase: pca x sector_interactions
pca_n_remove sweep
max_weight sweep
TE sensitivity
monthly vs 10d rebalance
LightGBM hyperparameter tuning (lr, leaves, depth, child_samples, subsample, colsample, alpha, lambda, n_est)
scripts.param_space: estimated from git log / memory - conservative lower bound

scripts.phase: structural redesign: cap-weighted BM (A), lean feature set 239 (C), LightGBM stabilisation (D), optimiser re-tuning (E)
scripts.param_space: single coordinated change set, not a grid

scripts.phase: C+ follow-up: restore multi-horizon EPS/Sales/FCF growth + add 17 growth composite features (new 'Growth' group) to balance Quality vs Growth style representation
scripts.param_space: single coordinated change set, not a grid
scripts.result: FAILED: IR 0.62 -> 0.23, rolled back to A+C+D+E

scripts.phase: F: reduce to 81 hand-picked core features + enable core-satellite portfolio style (max_active_share 0.40 L1, max_active_per_stock 0.06)
scripts.param_space: single coordinated change set, not a grid

scripts.phase: G: block OW on stocks with z-score < 0 (prevent MVO diversification quirk from overweighting negative signals)
scripts.param_space: single coordinated change set, not a grid

scripts.phase: H: further pruned core features 81 -> 46 based on feature_importance ranking from previous run
scripts.param_space: single coordinated change set, not a grid

scripts.phase: I: restore JPM/GS by switching from all-sheet intersection to essential-sheet intersection. Optional sheets (FCF/CAPEX/EV_EBITDA) have NaN for banks, filled by per-date median. Universe 48 -> 50.
scripts.param_space: single coordinated change set, not a grid

scripts.phase: ai_signal_cc2_rl Meta-Controller(4) + Signal Overlay(7 feature groups) PPO. Pretrain cutoff 2024-12-31, walk-forward fine-tune every ~63d (2 episodes). Base config = iter15_65tkr_reb21_vtg.
scripts.param_space: single coordinated RL configuration (rl_enabled=true, rl_mode=hybrid, rl_overlay_clip=0.30)

scripts.phase: S7 AI-logic arm (2026-07-06): Grinold variance-scaling mu_i = z_i * sigma_i / median_CS(sigma). Single pre-registered parameter-free transform, no sweep.
scripts.result: IR 1.552503 (dIR +0.0711 < +0.36 SE, subperiod sign inconsistent: P1/P2 down, P3 up) -> gate not met, OFF-default, no flip

scripts.phase: S7 AI-logic arm (2026-07-06): confidence spread_scale recalibrated from default 0.20 to D0 raw_spread median. Single pre-registered value, no sweep.
scripts.result: IR 1.483625 (dIR +0.0022, subperiod P2 sign inconsistent -0.112) -> gate not met, OFF-default, no flip

scripts.phase: S7 AI-logic arm (2026-07-06): trailing-IC adaptive prediction EMA, alpha_t=clip(0.5+(tIC-m)/(2*IQR),0.25,0.75) with m/IQR anchored to D0 trailing_ic_dist. Single pre-registered functional form, no sweep. 2-pass injection, src/ untouched.
scripts.param_space: adaptive-EMA single pre-registered functional form (D0-anchored constants, zero free params)
scripts.result: IR 1.484346 (dIR +0.0029, subperiod P2 -0.432 sign inconsistent) -> gate not met, OFF-default, no flip

scripts.phase: S7 AI-logic arm (2026-07-06): LGBM seed ensemble k=5, seeds {42,43,44,45,46}, finite-mean of pre-EMA z-panels + per-date CS restandardize + EMA(0.5). Single pre-registered config, no k sweep. 2-pass injection, src/ untouched.
scripts.param_space: seed ensemble k=5 (single pre-registered config, no k sweep)
scripts.result: IR 1.317520 (dIR -0.1639) -> gate not met, OFF-default, no flip. NOTE: seed 43-46 full harvests = per-seed diagnostics 4 runs (non-selection input to A4, NOT counted as trials); per-seed IR 42=1.481/43=1.184/44=1.057/45=1.110/46=1.406 quantifies seed-luck variance.

scripts.phase: S8 sentiment feature arm (2026-07-07): single pre-registered feature `news_trend` (NEWS_SENTIMENT_DAILY_AVG 5d-21d rolling-mean spread) conditionally added to the core whitelist via the news_trend_feature_enabled flag. default-OFF, no sweep. Feature-panel change forces a full pipeline re-run (not cache-safe); ECOS solver, src feature code untouched.
scripts.result: IR 1.272249 (dIR -0.2092, subperiod P1/P2/P3 dIR all negative -0.053/-0.309/-0.180) -> gate not met, OFF-default, no flip. Feature injection confirmed (model features 61->62, exactly +news_trend). TE 0.030094 (<=0.045, character preserved), ECOS 188 / fallback 0.0%.

notes: 396 is a conservative lower bound. Actual N is likely higher once
ad-hoc config.py tweaks over the research period are counted.
If in doubt, pass a larger --n_trials to run_selection_bias.py.
The DSR penalty grows as sqrt(2*ln N), so going from 1 to 396 multiplies
the haircut by sqrt(2*ln(396)) ~ 3.45, not by 396 itself.
2026-07-06: +4 S7 AI-logic arms (A1 mu_vol_scaling, A2 confidence_spread_recal,
A3 adaptive_ema, A4 seed_ensemble), all evaluated and OFF-default (no production flip).
N 403 -> 407. A4's seed 43-46 harvests are non-selection diagnostic inputs, NOT counted
as trials (they feed the single A4 ensemble config).
2026-07-07: +1 S8 arm (news_trend sentiment feature), evaluated and OFF-default (no flip).
